name: Blue Lake Golf Club
description: Blue Lake Golf Club is a place to play pickleball in Horseshoe Bay, TX. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Chapel of the Hills Baptist Church
description: Chapel of the Hills Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Buchanan Dam, TX. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Horseshoe Bay Resort
description: Horseshoe Bay Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Horseshoe Bay, TX. There are 14 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Round Mountain
description: Round Mountain is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Horseshoe Bay, TX. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Sam Martin Memorial Pickleball Courts
description: Sam Martin Memorial Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Horseshoe Bay, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Tuscan Village's Club Salus
description: Tuscan Village at Summit Rock and its amenities are private and restricted to members only.
